method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Tighten conceptual precision and reduce drift next run.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Echoes of Synthetic Memory' has pushed me to explore the intricate dance between humanity and technology. I want to capture how machines influence our perception of reality, often distorting the essence of human experience. This piece is a reflection on that tension, using structured layering to convey depth and complexity.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The use of glitch composites allows me to reflect on themes of decay and signal, representing the fragility of memory in a digital age. High-contrast colors paired with a muted counterweight visually express the struggle between synthetic and human elements.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Signal Weather" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Signal Weather step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
